drl:
rule "R0"
salience -7
when
    T1(f0 not in (1, 2, 1))
    exists(T1(f0 in (1, -1, -3)) and not(T0(f1 != "zz")))
    T1(!(f0 not in (-2, -3, -1000000007)), $b0_2_0 : f0, $b0_2_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0(f2 != true, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    T0(f1 contains "z", f0 != true)
    T0(f1 >= "ab", $b2_1_0 : f2)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 5
when
    T1(!(f0 in (12)), $b3_0_0 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
